creator: stacey@vickiandstacey.com
text:
Hello,

On Wed, 07 Feb 2007, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/108868'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs. 
> 
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=108868
> 
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       portupgrade monodoc-1.1.13 or mono-1.1.13.8.1 fails with repeated "CRITICAL **:
> >Arrival-Date:   Wed Feb 07 12:20:30 GMT 2007

As per the advisory you pointed me to at /usr/ports/lang/mono/pkg-message, I elected to go for
the reboot option, which sorted this for me.

Thanks for the assistance!

Regards,

Stacey
